##NAMES=Ferrosilite
##RRUFFID=R070387
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^2+^_2_Si_2_O_6_
##LOCALITY=Central Gneissic Complex (Khtada Lake), British Columbia, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Jibamitra Ganguly
##DESCRIPTION=Translucent greenish-yellow grains with vitreous luster, known as Hollister enstatite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070387
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Fe_0.48_Mg_0.47_Al_0.02_Ca_0.02_[box]_0.01_)Si_1.00_O_3_ ; = light phase. There are trace amounts of Mn and Ti. The dark phase = quartz
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 18.317 b: 8.917 c: 5.2207 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 852.7 crystal system: orthorhombic
